title: AI Model Configuration and Visualization Playground

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: AI Model Configuration and Visualization Playground

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'>
<rect x='10' y='10' width='380' height='280' fill='#090a0f'/>
<circle cx='200' cy='150' r='100' fill='#C06C88'/>
<rect x='120' y='70' width='160' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='2'/>
<rect x='120' y='100' width='160' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='2'/>
<rect x='120' y='130' width='160' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='2'/>
<text x='160' y='75' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='16' font-family='Arial'>AI Model 1</text>
<text x='160' y='115' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='16' font-family='Arial'>AI Model 2</text>
<text x='160' y='155' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='16' font-family='Arial'>AI Model 3</text>
<rect x='250' y='70' width='150' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='2'/>
<text x='300' y='75' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='16' font-family='Arial'>Configuration</text>
<rect x='250' y='100' width='150' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='2'/>
<text x='300' y='115' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='16' font-family='Arial'>Visualization</text>
<rect x='250' y='130' width='150' height='20' fill='#B7D7CD' rx='2'/>
<text x='300' y='155' fill='#FFFFFF' font-size='16' font-family='Arial'>Compare</text>
</svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use a custom dropdown for AI model selection and configuration
Must use a chart component to visualize performance metrics
Must include a comparison feature to display results side-by-side

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: AI Model Configuration and Visualization Playground

gradingCriteria.description: Verify the custom dropdown for AI model selection and configuration is functional and properly updated
Verify the chart component is rendering performance metrics correctly and updating in real-time
Verify the comparison feature is displaying results side-by-side and updating correctly
